normal_prompt: Lightly enhance this photo while keeping it natural, realistic and true to life. Keep real skin tones and the face clearly recognizable. Do NOT stylize, cartoonify or change colors — only subtle cleanup, sharpening and balanced lighting.
bw_prompt: Convert this photo into a high contrast black and white image. Pure blacks and whites with dramatic shadows, like a bold ink drawing or stark engraving. No color, no mid grays.
eightbit_prompt: Transform this photo into vibrant retro 8-bit pixel art in the style of a 1980s ZX Spectrum home computer. Bold saturated primary colors, blocky pixelated look, a small bright palette, high energy and graphic. Keep the face clearly recognizable.
_comment: Three styles map to these prompts: NORMAL=normal_prompt, BLACK & WHITE=bw_prompt, 8 BIT=eightbit_prompt. Gemini key: https://aistudio.google.com/apikey
